title: Best Buy’s Black Friday in July Sale Is Your Second Chance at Snagging Prime Day Deals
gist: Best Buy's 'Black Friday in July' event (through July 26) offers real but explicitly lesser discounts than Prime Day across TVs, Apple gear, tablets and speakers, while quietly revealing Apple's creeping price inflation on the MacBook Air.

insights.claim: Best Buy's 'Black Friday in July' sale runs through Sunday, July 26, and is explicitly framed by WIRED as a second-chance event for shoppers who missed Prime Day, with deals described as not necessarily as good as Prime Day's.
insights.speaker: Kat Merck
insights.so_what: Retailers are proliferating manufactured discount events year-round rather than concentrating value into a single seasonal sale, diluting the significance of any one 'Black Friday'-branded promotion.
insights.quote: The deals aren’t necessarily as good as they were on Prime Day, but if you missed out on that event, this is your next best bet.
insights.locator: Best Buy’s annual Black Friday in July sale

insights.claim: The MacBook Air (M5, 2026) sale price of $1,199 at Best Buy is $100 higher than the base price consumers saw earlier this year, because Apple recently raised the 13-inch model's price by $200.
insights.speaker: Kat Merck
insights.so_what: Even a 'discount' event doesn't fully offset a recent list-price hike, showing Apple's effective pricing floor is rising even as retailers advertise percentage-off deals.
insights.locator: Given that Apple recently raised its price by $200

insights.claim: The discounted Apple iPad (2025, A16) at $399 has Apple's new A16 chip but, per WIRED, does not have enough RAM to support Apple Intelligence.
insights.speaker: Kat Merck
insights.so_what: Apple appears to be deliberately segmenting entry-level hardware to exclude on-device AI features, reserving them for pricier tiers.
insights.locator: There’s not enough RAM to support Apple Intelligence

insights.claim: The Hisense CanvasTV S7N, a 50-inch 'art TV' that displays artwork or personal photos when not in use, is discounted 50% from $1,300 to $650 at Best Buy, reflecting a broader trend of art TVs becoming popular.
insights.speaker: Kat Merck
insights.so_what: Steep discounting on a relatively new product category suggests retailers are aggressively pushing art TVs to build category awareness.
insights.locator: Art TVs are hot right now

insights.claim: The Roborock Qrevo Curv, a 2024 flagship robot vacuum, is discounted 59% from $1,600 to $650 at Best Buy, one of the deepest percentage discounts in the roundup.
insights.speaker: Kat Merck
insights.so_what: Large discounts on a two-year-old flagship model signal retailers are clearing older robot-vacuum inventory ahead of newer releases.
insights.locator: This 2024 flagship model is not new
